RenewReservedInstance.reservedInstanceTime: Renewal duration for reserved instances, supports 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 36 months, must match the original purchase duration
RenewReservedInstance.reservedInstanceTimeUnit: Time unit for reserved instance purchase duration, default is month, cannot be changed
RenewReservedInstance.autoRenewTimeUnit: Time unit for reserved instance auto-renewal duration, default is month, cannot be changed
RenewReservedInstance.autoRenewTime: Auto-renewal duration for reserved instances, supports 3, 6, 9, 12, 24, 36 months, required when autoRenew is true and must match reservedInstanceTime
